card_description: Sebastian Hermes (meaning "Sebastian = venerable; Hermes = messenger god") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Counter-Clock World*. Librarian in a world where time runs backward and the dead return to life. Name note: The venerable divine messenger. Custodian of knowledge in a world where the dead are being un-buried. First appears in *Counter-Clock World*.

reference.brief: Librarian in a world where time runs backward and the dead return to life
reference.significance: Custodian of knowledge in a world where the dead are being un-buried
